data.title: Edesa Biotech (Nasdaq: EDSA) reports Q1 2026 results, financials for three months ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: Today, Edesa Biotech, Inc. (Nasdaq:EDSA), a company specializing in host-directed therapeutics for immuno-inflammatory diseases, released financial data for the quarter ending December 31, 2025. The report also included a business update, highlighting their progress in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical field.

data.title: Trump Media's Truth Social launching ETFs tied to Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Cronos, offering crypto exposure to investors.
data.description: Truth Social Funds has filed applications for Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) providing investors with exposure to cryptocurrency. One ETF concentrates on Bitcoin and Ethereum, while the other focuses on Cronos. These funds aim to offer investment opportunities in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Heartflow, Inc. to reveal 2025 financial outcomes on March 18, 2026 after market close; conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, on February 13, 2026, Heartflow, Inc. revealed that it is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 post-market closure on Wednesday, March 18, 2026. The organization, a pioneer in AI technology for coronary artery disease (CAD) and listed as HTFL on Nasdaq, will conduct a conference call to review the financial results at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day.

data.title: Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust in N.J. shares estimated 2025 tax info; official data to be out by March 31, 2026. Download from website.
data.description: A trust named Copper Property CTL Pass Through Trust in Jersey City, N.J., has released estimated Federal income tax details for its 2025 earnings on its website. The final information is expected to be available by March 31, 2026. However, it is important to note that the information provided is not intended as tax advice, and individuals are advised to consult their tax advisor for further guidance. It is emphasized that no reliance should be placed on the information shared on the website for tax purposes.
US bank deposits rose to $18.719 trln from $18.645 trln in prior week

data.title: Farmer Bros (NASDAQ: FARM) Q2 earnings missed estimates by -100.0%, reporting EPS of $-0.22 vs. $-0.11. Revenue decreased by $1.10 million.
data.description: On Friday, February 13, 2026, at 04:15 PM, Farmer Bros (NASDAQ: FARM) disclosed its Q2 financial results. The company fell short of anticipated earnings by -100.0%, with an EPS of $-0.22 compared to the projected $-0.11. Revenue also dropped by $1.10 million compared to the previous year. This continues a recent trend as in the previous quarter, Farmer Bros also missed earnings expectations. For a detailed analysis, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Western Digital (Nasdaq: WDC) to attend Morgan Stanley Conference on March 3, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. PT / 10:45 a.m. ET.
data.description: A company headquartered in San Jose, Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), shared that its management will take part in an upcoming investor conference. The event, Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, is scheduled for Tuesday, March 3, 2026, at 7:45 a.m. PT / 10:45 a.m. ET. The management presentation can be watched live through a webcast on WD’s Investor Relations site at investor.wdc.com. A replay of the presentation will also be available on the website shortly after the event.

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics closes $460M public offering with full underwriters' option exercised.
data.description: In San Francisco on February 13, 2026, Nektar Therapeutics, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq with the symbol NKTR, completed an underwritten public offering. The offering totaled $460 million and aimed at supporting the development of groundbreaking medicines in immunotherapy.

data.title: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) declares quarterly dividend of $1.19 per share on common stock, payable on March 13.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on February 13, 2026, Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly dividend of $1.19 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of the specified date will receive this dividend on March 13, 2026.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declared $0.12 dividend per share for Feb 2026, paid on Mar 13, 2026.
data.description: In Atlanta on February 13, 2026, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) disclosed a cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share for February 2026. This dividend is set to be distributed to stockholders on March 13, 2026.

data.title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) declared $0.43 quarterly cash dividend; Payable on March 31, 2026.
data.description: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LDOS) based in Reston, Va., has revealed that its board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.43 per outstanding share of its common stock. This dividend will be paid out on March 31, 2026, to all stockholders.

data.title: Farmer Brothers Coffee reports Q2 2026 financial results: $88.9 million net sales, $32 million gross profit, $4.9 million net loss.
data.description: Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. reported its second quarter fiscal 2026 financial results, with net sales at $88.9 million, marking a decrease of 1% from the prior year. Gross profit was $32 million, or 36.3% during the quarter, compared to $38.8 million, or 43.1% in the same period last year. Operating expenses stood at $36.4 million, with a net loss of $4.9 million, as opposed to a net income of $200,000 in the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $484,000, down from $5.9 million. The company had $4.2 million in unrestricted cash and $24.6 million available under its credit facility as of Dec. 31, 2025. Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. will host an investor conference call to discuss its financial results.

data.title: Jury in Philadelphia awards $250,000 to family in J&J baby powder trial over ovarian cancer death.
data.description: In Philadelphia, a jury at the Court of Common Pleas held Johnson & Johnson accountable for their baby powder products leading to the death of a Pennsylvania woman. After over three days of deliberation, the jury awarded $250,000 to the estate of Gayle Emerson from York, PA. Gayle, who passed away in November 2019 due to ovarian cancer, had filed the lawsuit six months before her death.

data.title: Ready Capital Corporation reported Q4 and full year 2025 financial results, with a webcast call scheduled for Feb. 27 at 8:30 am.
data.description: Ready Capital Corporation (NYSE: RC) revealed that it will unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the New York Stock Exchange ends trading on Thursday, February 26, 2026. The management team is set to conduct a webcast and conference call on Friday, February 27, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. This session aims to offer a business overview and delve into the financial performance for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: NextEra Energy and Exelon welcome PJM Board approval for a proposed ~220-mile, 765-kV transmission line project.
data.description: In Juno Beach, Florida and Chicago on February 13, 2026, NextEra Energy Transmission, LLC, a subsidiary of NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE), and Exelon Corporation (Nasdaq: EXC) celebrated the approval by the PJM Board of Directors for their planned ~220-mile, 765-kV transmission line project.

data.title: Exact Sciences (NASDAQ: EXAS) Q4 earnings missed estimates by -362.5%, reporting EPS of $-0.21. Revenue increased by $164.96 million from the same period last year. [Word count: 48]
data.description: Exact Sciences (NASDAQ: EXAS) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 04:05 PM. The report revealed that the company missed estimated earnings by -362.5%, posting an EPS of $-0.21 compared to the expected $0.08.
